meaning: adj.愚蠢的,傻的,笨的,卤莽的,可爱的
examples: How foolish I am to entertain doubts.
It would be foolish to raise hopes unnecessarily.
It would be foolish to generalize from a single example.
In resigning Mr Cherry, who represents the village of Stedham, said the comments were "extremely foolish".
The Fed controls the money supply and it is foolish to go against its actions.
